## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? Why would this be useful?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you would like to see happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why they might not fit.

## Additional context

Links, mockups, related issues, or anything else that helps.
